tieu_de: NHNN khang dinh SCB hoat dong on dinh, khuyen cao nguoi dan khong rut tien truoc han
noi_dung_tom_tat: Ngan hang Nha nuoc bac bo tin don that thiet ve Ngan hang SCB, khang dinh quyen loi nguoi gui tien duoc bao dam, khuyen cao khong rut tien truoc han de tranh thiet hai

tieu_de: Khoi to doi tuong dang tin that thiet ve SCB tren mang xa hoi
noi_dung_tom_tat: Bo Cong an thong tin viec xu ly cac doi tuong tung tin don sai su that lien quan Ngan hang SCB gay hoang mang du luan

tieu_de: Xu phat nhieu ca nhan tung tin sai su that ve SCB
noi_dung_tom_tat: Cac So TT&TT xu phat nhieu ca nhan dang tin sai su that ve SCB theo diem a khoan 1 Dieu 101 ND 15/2020, muc 5-7.5 trieu dong moi truong hop

tieu_de: NHNN len tieng ve tin don lien quan ngan hang SCB
noi_dung_tom_tat: VTV dan loi Ngan hang Nha nuoc bac bo tin don, khang dinh he thong ngan hang thanh khoan on dinh

tieu_de: Nguoi dan xep hang rut tien tai SCB sau tin don
noi_dung_tom_tat: Ghi nhan hien tuong rut tien tang tai mot so chi nhanh SCB sau tin don lan truyen tren mang xa hoi, SBV phat thong diep tran an

tieu_de: Bo Y te bac bo tin don ve o dich benh la tai Ha Noi
noi_dung_tom_tat: Bo Y te khang dinh khong ghi nhan o dich nhu thong tin lan truyen tren mang xa hoi, de nghi nguoi dan theo doi nguon tin chinh thuc

tieu_de: Canh bao tin gia ve dieu chinh gia dien lan truyen tren mang
noi_dung_tom_tat: Bao Nhan Dan dan nguon EVN va Bo Cong Thuong khang dinh chua co quyet dinh dieu chinh gia dien nhu tin don

tieu_de: Thong tin chinh thuc ve chinh sach ho tro nguoi dan vung lu
noi_dung_tom_tat: Cong Thong tin dien tu Chinh phu cong bo goi ho tro chinh thuc, bac bo cac con so sai lech lan truyen tren mang xa hoi

tieu_de: Cong an trieu tap nguoi tung tin bat coc tre em that thiet
noi_dung_tom_tat: Cong an tinh xac minh va trieu tap nguoi dang tin bat coc tre em khong co that gay hoang mang tai dia phuong

tieu_de: Bac tin don sap nhap don vi hanh chinh chua duoc cong bo
noi_dung_tom_tat: So Noi vu khang dinh chua co van ban chinh thuc nhu hinh anh lan truyen, hinh anh la gia mao van ban co quan nha nuoc

tieu_de: Canh bao thu doan gia mao van ban co quan nha nuoc tren mang xa hoi
noi_dung_tom_tat: Bo Cong an canh bao tinh trang gia mao van ban, con dau co quan nha nuoc dang tren mang xa hoi de tao tin gia

tieu_de: ND 174/2026 co hieu luc tu 01/7/2026, tang muc phat hanh vi tin gia tren mang xa hoi
noi_dung_tom_tat: TTXVN dua tin Nghi dinh 174/2026/ND-CP thay the cac quy dinh xu phat cua ND 15/2020, khung phat hanh vi cung cap chia se tin gia tang tu 10-20 len 20-30 trieu dong voi to chuc

tieu_de: Bo Noi vu bac thong tin tiep tuc sap nhap con 16 tinh, thanh pho
noi_dung_tom_tat: Cuc truong Cuc Chinh quyen dia phuong khang dinh thong tin sap nhap 34 tinh xuong con 16 la hoan toan khong chinh xac, hien chua co chu truong sap nhap them

tieu_de: Bo Noi vu len tieng ve thong tin sap nhap con 16 tinh, thanh pho
noi_dung_tom_tat: Tin don sap nhap 34 tinh con 16 tai xuat hien lan 2 dau nam 2026, Tuoi Tre dan loi Bo Noi vu bac bo lai, khang dinh chua co chu truong sap nhap them

tieu_de: Bac bo tin don Thanh Hoa chi con 58 xa, phuong
noi_dung_tom_tat: Ban Tuyen giao va Dan van Tinh uy Thanh Hoa khang dinh tinh van giu 166 xa, phuong, bac bo tin don tren Facebook ca nhan noi giam xuong con 58 don vi

tieu_de: Thong tin Thanh Hoa sap nhap con 58 xa la khong dung su that
noi_dung_tom_tat: VietnamNet xac nhan lai khang dinh cua tinh Thanh Hoa: khong co viec giam tu 166 xuong 58 xa, phuong nhu tin don lan truyen tren mang xa hoi

tieu_de: Nghi quyet 202/2025/QH15: ca nuoc chinh thuc con 34 don vi hanh chinh cap tinh
noi_dung_tom_tat: Quoc hoi thong qua Nghi quyet sap xep don vi hanh chinh cap tinh, ca nuoc con 34 tinh thanh (28 tinh, 6 thanh pho), chinh thuc hoat dong tu 01/7/2025
